task.original:
Task #2 from NEXT_STEPS.MD — responsive playfield sizing (desktop + mobile).

Core scope (unchanged):
- Keep abstract grid dimensions 10x20 unchanged.
- Compute display scale from viewport/container limits.
- Update canvas CSS size + backing buffer with DPR.
- Recompute cell pixel metrics on resize.
- Keep visuals crisp; avoid layout reads in hot movement paths.

Mobile and responsive-canvas requirements:
- Use visualViewport when available; fall back to window inner dimensions.
- Respect safe-area-inset-* (notched phones); scale from container bounds in layout shell.
- Cap max scale on large desktops; enforce minimum readable cell size on narrow phones.
- Listen for resize, orientationchange, and visualViewport resize; debounce layout reads.
- touch-action: none on playfield canvas; avoid fixed pixel widths on mobile.
- Test portrait and landscape; side panel may stack below playfield on narrow breakpoints.
- Follow responsive-canvas skill best practices for DPR backing store and CSS sizing.

Files: public/assets/js/board.js, public/assets/css/index.css

history.summary: Worktree created from master @ 9856100; task 2 registered; stale board-renderer-state worktree pruned.
Worktree already existed on feature/responsive-playfield-sizing from master @ 9856100; task 2 registered (skipped re-register).
Refined task.original with mobile viewport, safe-area, touch-action, orientation/resize, visualViewport, and responsive-canvas practices. Story draft pending user approval.
User approved mobile-aware Gherkin story; story.md written.
14 requirements for responsive playfield sizing (desktop + mobile): viewport/container scale, visualViewport, DPR, safe-area, touch-action, debounced resize, cached hot-path metrics.
17-line subtask checklist for responsive playfield sizing (mobile viewport, safe-area, touch-action, visualViewport, debounced resize, DPR, cached hot-path metrics); gates clear.

Responsive playfield sizing implemented in board.js and index.css — viewport/container scale with visualViewport fallback, DPR-backed canvas, min cell (13px) and max (300×600) caps, debounced resize listeners (125ms), cached hot-path metrics, safe-area padding, touch-action none, and 720px column stacking. All 17 subtasks checked; eslint passed.
Review approved — all requirements met, lint passed, ready for acceptance.
User accepted work after review — all 14 requirements met, lint passed.

Fix-2: compact panels (48px canvases, no labels/margins), single-screen horizontal layout, viewport-fit=cover, visibility MutationObserver refresh, min-cell scales below 130×260 when needed. Touched board.js, index.css, index.html. Lint passed.
Fix-2 code approved. All ## Fix items met in board.js/index.css/index.html. User browser playtest (resize, portrait, DPR, orientation) pending before acceptance.
User direction after playtest — mobile shows only playfield+hold+score; main menu full-width buttons and no scroll. fix_required r4 recorded.
Fix-3: mobile ≤720px hides right-side-container (upcoming, pause, upload) and lines score; desktop unchanged. Menu 100dvh no-scroll shell with 100%-width flex buttons. CSS-only; lint passed.

Fix-3 mobile hide CSS and menu button width pass static review; menu scroll blocked by hidden game-container min-height 100dvh (fix_required). User browser playtest pending for mobile layout acceptance.
Deferred mobile UI follow-ups documented (upcoming queue, game controls, lines score, phone controls) as 4 next-step specs from task #2.
Fix-4: CSS collapses visibility:hidden .game-container (height/min-height 0) so hidden game shell no longer stacks 100dvh under menu. Full height restores when game visible. Lint passed.
Fix-4 menu scroll fix approved static review; ready_for_acceptance pending user browser playtest for mobile layout.

User playtested and accepted responsive-playfield-sizing including fix rounds 2-4 and ad-hoc tweaks: board.js removed side-panel height cap in measureAvailableBounds; index.css menu buttons clamp height, board flex-shrink 0, desktop min-width 721px restores 90px previews.
